overview: An immersive NBA playoff betting research app that delivers obsessive depth on Player Points Props and Game Totals, with a full investigation room per game, AI-powered confidence reasoning, and multi-book odds analysis.
features: Today's NBA playoff games dashboard with live odds and game status
Investigation room per game — click to go deep on any matchup
Player Points Props analysis: usage rate, matchup defensive rating, recent form, injury adjustments, AI confidence reasoning
Game Totals/O/U analysis: team pace, offensive/defensive efficiency, scoring trends, referee tendencies, AI confidence reasoning
Live odds from multiple sportsbooks with line discrepancy highlighting
Confidence meters (0-100) with plain-language AI explanations for every bet
Backend data integration from SportsFBI, ESPN, The Odds API, and API-Sports/API-NBA
